method: Deep-dive on top A/B candidates + remaining promising candidates

businesses.successor_status: STRONG A-TIER — verified no successor in family or on team
businesses.details: Catherine Awtrey (President/Owner, took over 2003 = 23 yrs). Address: 728 Lingco Drive, Richardson TX 75081 (Dallas suburb, NOT Houston). Wayne Awtrey founded 1996; died 2003. Catherine is career-changer widow (Blair TV → real estate → image consulting → roofing). D CEO Magazine 'Women Who Built Dallas' June 2019. NTRCA Industry Leader of the Year 2020. NO Awtrey children on team page. Senior management team: Mike Cieri (CFO), Danielle Begley (VP Business Ops), John Wayne Whitten (Senior Advisor + QA/QC Manager), Brett Norvell (Director of Ops), Ian Sellers (Service Manager), Dustin Daniel (Chief Estimator), Ana Ledbetter (Service Coordinator). Commercial preventive maintenance contracts = strong recurring revenue. Annual maintenance program. Firm-bid pricing. Service hours + 24/7 service (972-272-7663 office, 972-231-8350 service).

businesses.successor_status: INTERNAL SUCCESSOR VISIBLE — DEMOTE FROM A

Cloud family: Joshua Cloud (Manager) + Kenneth Cloud (BBB filings) = Cloud family multi-generational. Founded 1975 = 50 yrs. Same-surname succession in place.

John + Trish Josephs (husband-wife owners). Cypress TX. 15+ yrs operating (founded ~2010, not 20+ as earlier). Younger owners (likely 40-55) — wrong cohort for natural-exit window. Versico Gold Medal 8 yrs. Commercial flat TPO/PVC.

businesses.details: David + Steve Wortham founded 1986 = 40 yrs. Ben Wortham appears in testimonials (likely son). McKinney TX. TPO + EPDM + metal + residential. No formal team page.

Preventive maintenance program. 3000+ school roofs (Duro-Last). Lorena TX (Waco). McLennan County. Stuart's Sports Ranch development = capital allocation outside roofing = potential exit signal.
